name: Credit Corp Group Limited
analysis: CCP's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 25% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$12.3600. Trade idea: entry A$13.1000, stop A$11.2068, target A$14.5370 (0.76:1) — then trail it.
